summary: US-844 release gate passed. Spexus current_context was read before task access, task PERSONAL-TASK-1160 was read, and current_context was read again before the PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy. All listed dependency reports were present and valid JSON. Accepted dependency evidence is risk-free where applicable and collectively covers the US-844 scoring model, deal settlement UI, final settlement/ranking, no-continuation completion guard, US-scoped integration tests, accessibility, visual regression, prior MZ-406 blocker closure, and component regression. Fresh npm run verify passed locally with 13 test files, 126 tests, tsc, and vite build. The MZ-406 Playwright screenshots are correctly classified as synthetic/static visual UI evidence rather than backend-live evidence; this is acceptable for the static Vite/localStorage game and visual NFR scope. No expanded statistics or full visible deal history were found beyond the approved score table, current/previous deal result, final ranking/result summary, and existing compact in-game log.

tests_run.evidence: Active project PERSONAL and default component context read before Spexus artifact access.

Verified release-gate task scope, refs PERSONAL-US-844, PERSONAL-REQ-1760, PERSONAL-REQ-1761, PERSONAL-AC-2426, PERSONAL-AC-2427, dependencies MZ-401 through MZ-407, critical QA risk, and release-readiness requirement.

Confirmed US-844 requires bullet, mountain, mutual whists for all three players, deal/final settlement exposed to UI, final ranking/result summary, and no accidental continuation after bullet completion. Confirmed expanded statistics and visible history of every past deal are out of MVP scope.

tests_run.command: JSON.parse review of all listed dependency reports and supporting PERSONAL-US-844 review report
tests_run.evidence: Validated task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1153/attempt-1.json, 1154/attempt-1.json, 1155/attempt-1.json, 1156/attempt-1.json, 1157/attempt-1.json, 1158/attempt-1.json, 1158/fix-1.json, 1158/orchestrator-visual-rerun.json, 1158/attempt-2.json, 1159/attempt-1.json, and PERSONAL-US-844/review-cycle-1/review-report.json as parseable JSON. Accepted reports are risk-free; the prior 1158 attempt-1 failure is closed by fix-1, orchestrator-visual-rerun, and attempt-2.

Confirmed score model stores bullet, mountain, and directed mutual whists for three players; deal settlement calculates before/delta/after score data and whist adjustments; settleDeal transitions to next-deal or finished; finished state carries finalResult ranking and exposes no next-deal continuation path.

Confirmed score table, deal result panel, final result/ranking panel, accessibility labels/regions, and no continuation controls in finished state are tested and rendered. Confirmed no expanded stats or full visible past-deal history was added beyond the existing compact log and approved result surfaces.

Classified MZ-406 screenshots as synthetic/static UI visual evidence: the script imports renderGame/createNewGame/settleDealResult in the browser and renders constructed active, settlement, and final states against the local Vite app. It does not prove backend-live behavior. Reports show desktop/laptop screenshots and metrics after the visual fix, with the prior 1024x768 settlement clipping blocker closed.
Vitest passed 13 files and 126 tests. Production build passed with tsc and vite build.

verification_environment.runtime: npm project marriage-browser-remake 0.1.0, Vite static browser app, localStorage persistence, no backend server in release scope

release_readiness_command.details: 13 test files and 126 tests passed; tsc and vite build completed successfully.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Maintain full preference score model with bullet, mountain, and mutual whists for all three players throughout the bullet.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1154/attempt-1.json; src/domain/scoring.ts; src/domain/state.ts; src/ui/render.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.result: passed: MZ-402 reports implementation and tests for bullet, mountain, and mutual whists. Source inspection confirmed Score has bullet, mountain, whists [number, number, number], scoring functions clone/apply all three score dimensions, and renderer exposes all three players' values.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No backend live path applies because the release scope is a static Vite browser game using localStorage.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Settle each completed deal and final bullet, calculate deal result/final settlement, and expose the result to the UI.
evidence_matrix.result: passed: MZ-402/MZ-403/MZ-404 and source review confirm deal settlement builds DealResult, settleDeal applies scoresAfter, final completion calculates FinalResult ranking, and UI renders deal/final result panels.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Integration evidence is local project test/runtime evidence for a static app, not backend API coverage.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given a deal completes, when the deal result is settled, the score table shows updated bullet, mountain, and mutual whist values for all players.
mocked_paths: output/playwright/mz406-capture.mjs renders constructed active, settlement, and final states for visual/static UI screenshots.
evidence_matrix.result: passed: src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts settles a deal, verifies updated scoresAfter equals settled scores, verifies mutual whist adjustment values, and checks next-deal UI includes score/result content. MZ-405 confirms accessible score/result structure. MZ-406 confirms desktop/laptop visual readability after the clipping fix.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Playwright screenshots are synthetic/static visual UI evidence only and are not backend-live evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given the bullet target is reached, when final settlement is calculated, the game shows final ranking/result summary and prevents accidental continuation.
mocked_paths: output/playwright/mz406-capture.mjs renders constructed final state for visual/static UI screenshots.
evidence_matrix.result: passed: src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts drives settleDeal to finished, verifies finalResult winner/ranking, rendered final result text, absence of Следующая сдача, and absence of settleDeal/startNextDeal action controls. MZ-405 and MZ-406 corroborate accessible/readable final result UI and no continuation buttons.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Visual evidence is synthetic/static UI evidence. No backend live path applies to this static app.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Confirm US-844 completion across scoring implementation, result UI, US-scoped integration tests, accessibility, visual checks, component regression, and release readiness.
mocked_paths: MZ-406 Playwright visual captures use constructed frontend states against the local Vite app.
evidence_matrix.result: passed: Dependency reports cover QA design, scoring domain/engine, UI result rendering, US-scoped integration tests, accessibility, visual regression, and component regression. MZ-407 component regression passed, and fresh npm run verify passed locally.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No backend-live evidence is claimed or required for the static browser/localStorage release scope.

evidence_matrix.req_or_ac_or_contract: owner-scope/no expanded stats or full visible deal history
evidence_matrix.scenario: Confirm implementation stayed inside approved US-844 scope and did not add expanded statistics or visible full deal history.
evidence_matrix.result: passed: Epic hierarchy marks expanded statistics and visible history of every past deal out of scope. Source/report review found only approved current score, current/previous deal result, final ranking/result summary, and existing compact in-game log surfaces; technical history remains persistence/debug scope and is not exposed as full visible past-deal history.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Scope review is based on source/report inspection rather than a separate UI crawl.

quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: All listed dependency and supporting reports were present and valid JSON. Accepted reports for MZ-401 through MZ-407 are risk-free where applicable; MZ-406 prior failure is treated as historical context only and is closed by later accepted evidence.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: PERSONAL-US-844 review-cycle-1 report was used as supporting context only, not as the final completion gate.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts; src/domain/scoring.ts; src/domain/engine.ts; src/ui/render.ts; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1159/attempt-1.json; npm run verify
quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: Domain, engine, UI, integration, and component regression evidence covers deal settlement through score update, next-deal transition, bullet completion, final ranking, and no continuation after completion. Fresh npm run verify passed.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Regression is exercised in local tests for a static app; no backend service exists in scope.

quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: US-844 integration test verifies updated bullet, mountain, and mutual whist values after deal settlement and UI synchronization; visual/accessibility reports support readability and labeling.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Visual screenshots are synthetic/static UI evidence, not backend-live evidence.

quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: US-844 integration test verifies finished phase, final result/ranking, and absence of continuation controls; visual/accessibility reports support final-result readability and no final-state buttons.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Visual screenshots are synthetic/static UI evidence, not backend-live evidence.

quality_gate_matrix.applicability: required for UI-facing US-844 score/result changes
quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: MZ-405 accepted report records accessible score sections, labeled result/final regions, keyboard-reachable native controls in active states, and no continuation controls in finished state; focused tests and npm run verify passed.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Accessibility evidence is test/source/report based; no separate manual assistive-technology session was recorded.

quality_gate_matrix.gate: visual evidence and prior MZ-406 blocker closure
quality_gate_matrix.applicability: required for UI layout/readability and prior MZ-406 visual blocker
quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: MZ-406 attempt 1 found laptop settlement clipping. fix-1 changed result-table labeling/stacking, orchestrator-visual-rerun recorded successful post-fix screenshot/metrics and npm verify, and attempt 2 accepted the closure. Screenshot evidence is synthetic/static visual UI evidence, not backend-live evidence.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Screenshots render constructed frontend states against local Vite; they prove visual/static UI layout only.

quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: Fresh verifier run of npm run verify passed: Vitest 13 files / 126 tests, then tsc and vite build passed.

quality_gate_matrix.applicability: not applicable beyond static localStorage persistence boundary
quality_gate_matrix.result: passed: No server, accounts, online multiplayer, network API, authorization, or sensitive data path is in US-844 release scope. The relevant persistence boundary is browser localStorage and is covered by save/load compatibility tests in dependency evidence and npm run verify.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No backend security test applies to this static browser release scope.
